title: Ex-Ditector Discovery Input
description: Normally provided automatically via metamorph from the Policy Gate. The same compliant scope enum is enforced here as defense in depth.

scope_type.title: Scope type
scope_type.description: Compliant scope only. Prohibited scopes are absent and cannot be selected.
enumTitles: Self — audit my own public footprint
Public figure — genuine public figure acting publicly
Brand — a company/brand/product I may monitor
Safety evidence — preserve public evidence of harm to me

case_id.title: Case ID
case_id.description: Case identifier issued by the Policy Gate. Leave blank only for isolated dev runs.

case_store_name.title: Case KV store name
case_store_name.description: Named key-value store holding the immutable CASE record.

target_urls.title: Target URLs
target_urls.description: Public, logged-out seed URLs to enqueue. Login-walled private hosts are blocked.
